name: Gadget Graveyard
tagline: Which half-forgotten device would you actually buy again?

items.text: An e-ink tablet that only syncs notes when you plug it in
A mechanical keyboard loud enough to summon the neighbors
A smart fridge that judges your midnight snack choices
A fitness ring that nags you about REM sleep at brunch
A retro handheld that emulates every console except the one you want
Noise-cancelling headphones that hiss like a distant kettle
A robot vacuum that gets stuck on the same rug daily
An action cam you bought for one trip and never charged again
A smart speaker that answers questions you did not ask
A mini drone with a camera and a three-minute battery
A laptop dock that needs a firmware update before it docks
A portable projector that only looks good after sunset
A smartwatch that celebrates closing your stand ring at midnight
A USB hub that disconnects when you breathe near it
An instant camera with film that costs more than dinner
A sleep tracker that wakes you up to report you slept poorly
